name: togedemaru
flavor_text: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: nuzzle
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: defense-curl
moves.effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: rollout
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: thunder-shock
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: fell-stinger
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: zing-zap
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: spiky-shield
moves.effect: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: assurance
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: electro-ball
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: electroweb
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: gyro-ball
moves.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: iron-head
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: iron-tail
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: payback
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.

moves.name: pin-missile
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: poison-jab
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: u-turn
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: wild-charge
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: work-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: disarming-voice
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: fake-out
moves.effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.

moves.name: flail
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: present
moves.effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.

moves.name: tickle
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: twineedle
moves.effect: Hits twice in the same turn.  Has a 20% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: wish
moves.effect: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.

moves.name: after-you
moves.effect: Makes the target act next this turn.

moves.name: covet
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: last-resort
moves.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.

moves.name: rising-voltage
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: role-play
moves.effect: Copies the target’s ability.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: steel-beam
moves.effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.

moves.name: steel-roller
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: super-fang
moves.effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.

abilitiesDetailed.name: iron-barbs
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

abilitiesDetailed.name: lightning-rod
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sturdy
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
